fakeCard.name: Echospell
fakeCard.oracleText: Copy target spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.
fakeCard.flavorText: "What's yours is also mine," the imitator smirked.
fakeCard.artworkPrompt: A red-robed mage copying a spell from a magical mirror, fire swirling around twin magical effects

hints: The real card has exactly 2 colored mana symbols.
The real card is blue.
The real card is an Instant.
The real card prevents something from happening.
The real card is from Alpha/Beta and has been reprinted many times.
curatorNotes: Classic card, great intro puzzle. Echospell is the exact opposite of Counterspell.

fakeCard.name: Healing Pulse
fakeCard.oracleText: Target creature or player gains 3 life.
fakeCard.flavorText: A gentle warmth where once there was burning pain.
fakeCard.artworkPrompt: A white-robed healer sending a beam of gentle golden light at a grateful warrior

hints: The real card deals damage.
The real card targets any target.
The real card costs only {R}.
The real card deals exactly 3 damage.
The real card is arguably the most efficient damage spell ever printed.
curatorNotes: Opposite of Lightning Bolt: instead of 3 damage for R, it's 3 life for W.

fakeCard.name: Light Penance
fakeCard.oracleText: Remove {W}{W}{W} from the mana pool. You lose 2 life.
fakeCard.flavorText: Sacrifice is the price of purity.
fakeCard.artworkPrompt: A white cleric kneeling in submission, three bright motes of light leaving their hands

hints: The real card adds mana to your mana pool.
The real card is black.
The real card is a Sorcery... wait, actually an Instant.
The real card adds {B}{B}{B} for {B}.
The real card is a staple of Legacy and Vintage combo decks.
curatorNotes: Dark Ritual inverted: instead of gaining BBB for B, you spend WWW and lose 2 life.

fakeCard.name: Plowshares to Swords
fakeCard.oracleText: Put a creature card from target player's graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. That player gains life equal to its power.
fakeCard.artworkPrompt: A dark necromancer raising a skeletal warrior from farmland, plowshares transforming into swords

hints: The real card removes a creature from the battlefield.
The real card is white.
The real card gives the opponent a benefit.
The real card exiles the creature.
The real card gives the opponent life equal to its power.

fakeCard.name: White Weed
fakeCard.oracleText: {T}: Remove three mana of any one color from your mana pool.
fakeCard.flavorText: It takes as quickly as the lotus gives.
fakeCard.artworkPrompt: A wilted grey flower draining magical energy from a mage's hands

hints: The real card adds mana.
The real card is free to cast.
The real card adds three mana of any color.
The real card is sacrificed to use.
The real card is the most valuable Magic card ever printed.
curatorNotes: Ultimate hard puzzle. White Weed costs mana and removes mana instead.
